top_signals.title: Soybeans and Corn Extend Gains as US-Iran Hostilities Escalate
top_signals.summary: Soybeans and corn futures extended gains as crude oil jumped after hostilities in the Middle East escalated, boosting the appeal of biofuels.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Tungsten Miner’s Stock Jumps as Forrest Buys Stake
top_signals.summary: EQ Resources Ltd. shares surged after mining billionaire Andrew Forrest agreed to acquire a 16.8% stake in the Sydney-listed tungsten producer from Oaktree Capital Management LP.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
